steps.title: Find the reason they're prized
steps.content: The second note explicitly states: “Musicians prize his Stradivarius violins for their famed sound quality.” This is the direct reason why they are prized by musicians.

steps.title: Apply the reason to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly emphasizes this reason — the violins are “renowned for their sound quality” among musicians.

The other three choices discuss naming conventions (A), biographical information (C and D) rather than explaining why the violins are valued.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
